clusters.title: UK designates IRGC as terrorist organisation
clusters.neutral_headline: UK Designates IRGC As Terrorist Organisation

items.title: UK designates IRGC as terrorist organisation
items.standfirst: The UK government has designated Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organisation under new powers.
items.content: The UK government has designated Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a terrorist organisation under new powers.

items.title: UK bans support for Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps
items.standfirst: Home Office announces move that officials say comes close to proscribing group as a terrorist organisationThe UK will ban support for Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, Keir Starmer said on Monday, in a move that officials said came close to proscribing the military group as a terrorist organisation.The prime minister announced his government would designate the branch of the Iranian military under a new National Security Act, enabling law enforcement to take action against anyone deemed to be providing it with support. Continue reading...
items.content: Home Office announces move that officials say comes close to proscribing group as a terrorist organisationThe UK will ban support for Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, Keir Starmer said on Monday, in a move that officials said came close to proscribing the military group as a terrorist organisation.The prime minister announced his government would designate the branch of the Iranian military under a new National Security Act, enabling law enforcement to take action against anyone deemed to be providing it with support. Continue reading...

items.title: UK bans support for Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps
items.standfirst: Shabana Mahmood will use new powers to ban support for the group, which has been linked to death threats and intimidation on British soil.
items.content: Shabana Mahmood will use new powers to ban support for the group, which has been linked to death threats and intimidation on British soil.

ai_summary: UK government designates IRGC as terrorist organisation
Home Office announces move to ban support for IRGC
Law enforcement to take action against IRGC supporters
Move comes close to proscribing IRGC as terrorist group
UK takes action against Iranian military group

clusters.title: Paramount and Warner Bros sued to block $110bn mega merger
clusters.neutral_headline: States Sue To Block Paramount Warner Bros Merger

items.title: Paramount and Warner Bros sued to block $110bn mega merger
items.standfirst: A dozen US states are taking legal action to halt the largest media consolidation in Hollywood history.
items.content: A dozen US states are taking legal action to halt the largest media consolidation in Hollywood history.

items.title: 12 states sue to block Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger
items.standfirst: The suit poses a new challenge to the $110 billion deal that would unite two of the nation's largest media companies.
items.content: The suit poses a new challenge to the $110 billion deal that would unite two of the nation's largest media companies.

items.title: States sue to stop Paramount-Warner Bros blockbuster merger
items.standfirst: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms.
items.content: California is among the states suing to block Paramount from buying Warner Bros. Discovery in a Hollywood mega-merger that would unite some of the nation's largest movie studios and TV newsrooms.(Image credit: Bloomberg via Getty Images)

ai_summary: 12 US states sue to block Paramount Warner Bros merger
Lawsuit poses challenge to $110 billion media deal
States take legal action to halt media consolidation
Paramount and Warner Bros face legal opposition
Merger would unite two large media companies

clusters.title: 1 person killed in Maine shooting involving ICE, state House speaker says
clusters.neutral_headline: Person Killed In Maine Shooting Involving ICE

items.title: 1 person killed in Maine shooting involving ICE, state House speaker says
items.standfirst: A person was shot and killed in Maine involving ICE, the state's House speaker said Monday. The shooting comes after an ICE agent fatally shot a Mexican man in Houston, Texas, last week. CBS News' Shanelle Kaul reports.
items.content: A person was shot and killed in Maine involving ICE, the state's House speaker said Monday. The shooting comes after an ICE agent fatally shot a Mexican man in Houston, Texas, last week. CBS News' Shanelle Kaul reports.

items.title: Person killed in shooting involving ICE agents in US state of Maine
items.standfirst: State lawmaker says one person was killed by immigration agents in Biddeford, days after another ICE shooting in Texas.
items.content: State lawmaker says one person was killed by immigration agents in Biddeford, days after another ICE shooting in Texas.

items.title: One person killed in Maine shooting involving ICE, state lawmaker says
items.standfirst: One person was killed in Maine in a fatal shooting involving US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), the speaker of the Maine House of Representatives said Monday. The incident came days after an ICE officer shot and killed a man at a traffic stop in Houston, Texas.
items.content: One person was killed in Maine in a fatal shooting involving US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), the speaker of the Maine House of Representatives said Monday. The incident came days after an ICE officer shot and killed a man at a traffic stop in Houston, Texas.

ai_summary: One person killed in Maine shooting involving ICE agents
Incident occurs in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday
State lawmaker confirms person was killed by ICE
Shooting comes after another ICE incident in Texas
ICE involved in fatal shooting in US state of Maine

clusters.title: Leaders give press conference after ‘coalition of the willing’ meeting in Paris – as it happened
clusters.neutral_headline: Leaders Meet In Paris For Ukraine Coalition Talks

items.title: Leaders give press conference after ‘coalition of the willing’ meeting in Paris – as it happened
items.standfirst: French president Emmanuel Macron has been hosting leaders amid hopes that Ukraine’s recent advances could force Putin towards negotiationsin KyivMeanwhile, Russia has been forced to suspend shipping in the Sea of Azov after 90 vessels were targeted by Ukrainian drones in less than a week. Continue reading...
items.content: French president Emmanuel Macron has been hosting leaders amid hopes that Ukraine’s recent advances could force Putin towards negotiationsin KyivMeanwhile, Russia has been forced to suspend shipping in the Sea of Azov after 90 vessels were targeted by Ukrainian drones in less than a week. Continue reading...

items.title: Replay: Macron speaks as Ukraine’s ‘Coalition of the Willing’ meeting ends in Paris
items.standfirst: Ukraine has ​ordered 16 Rafale fighter jets, an initial batch of new-generation SAMP/T surface-to-air defence batteries, and licences for the production of ‌several capabilities, including the Scalp cruise missile, French President Emmanuel Macron said ⁠Monday after a meeting of more than 20 "Coalition of the Willing" leaders in Paris
items.content: Ukraine has ​ordered 16 Rafale fighter jets, an initial batch of new-generation SAMP/T surface-to-air defence batteries, and licences for the production of ‌several capabilities, including the Scalp cruise missile, French President Emmanuel Macron said ⁠Monday after a meeting of more than 20 "Coalition of the Willing" leaders in Paris

items.title: ‘Coalition of the willing’ to build shared European anti-ballistic programme
items.standfirst: Ukraine and nine other countries including UK issue joint statement as leaders meet Volodymyr Zelenskyy in ParisUkraine and nine other countries including the UK, Germany and France are to build a shared protection programme for Europe against ballistic missiles, using Kyiv’s experience in fighting Russia’s full-scale invasion for more than four years.“Our goal is to build a shared ballistic missile defence capability for Europe,” the 10 nations said in a statement on Monday as leaders met the Ukrainian president, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, for talks in Paris. Continue reading...
items.content: Ukraine and nine other countries including UK issue joint statement as leaders meet Volodymyr Zelenskyy in ParisUkraine and nine other countries including the UK, Germany and France are to build a shared protection programme for Europe against ballistic missiles, using Kyiv’s experience in fighting Russia’s full-scale invasion for more than four years.“Our goal is to build a shared ballistic missile defence capability for Europe,” the 10 nations said in a statement on Monday as leaders met the Ukrainian president, Volodymyr Zelenskyy, for talks in Paris. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Leaders meet in Paris for Ukraine coalition talks
Ukraine orders Rafale fighter jets and defence systems
Countries to build shared European anti-ballistic programme
Ukraine and nine countries issue joint statement
Leaders discuss Ukraine's recent advances and negotiations
